evals.prompt: Triage investigation inv_3001 — it's a new Creative Fatigue investigation on campaign cmp_1001. Check if it has enough evidence to move forward.
evals.expected_output: A triage report that identifies inv_3001 as New/Creative Fatigue with Medium severity. Should flag that it only has 2 Metric evidence items but no Operator Note showing active engagement, and suggest the investigation needs an operator to review before advancing to Investigating status.
expectations: The report identifies the investigation status as New
The report identifies the issue type as Creative Fatigue
The report flags the absence of an Operator Note
The report includes a Field Quality section assessing question, hypothesis, next_action, and owner
The report includes an Evidence Completeness section
The report recommends a specific next action

evals.prompt: Is investigation inv_3003 ready to be resolved? It's the low viewability issue on campaign cmp_1002 that's currently in Needs Action status with Critical severity.
evals.expected_output: A triage report showing inv_3003 is in Needs Action status with a Metric, QA Check, and Recommendation as evidence. Should note that the evidence profile is complete for Needs Action status but the investigation is not yet ready for Resolved because resolution_summary is not populated and resolved_at is not set.
expectations: The report identifies the investigation status as Needs Action
The report identifies the severity as Critical
The report notes the investigation has a Recommendation evidence item
The report flags that resolution_summary is missing or not yet populated
The report does not recommend resolving the investigation yet
The output follows the structured triage report format

evals.prompt: Review the quality of investigation inv_3005 — the resolved Data Discrepancy investigation. Is the resolution well-documented?
evals.expected_output: A triage report confirming inv_3005 is Resolved with Low severity. Should verify that resolution_summary is populated, resolved_at is set, and evidence includes a Metric and QA Check. Should confirm the resolution is well-documented.
expectations: The report identifies the investigation status as Resolved
The report confirms resolution_summary is present
The report confirms resolved_at timestamp exists
The report identifies evidence types present (Metric, QA Check)
The report gives a positive assessment of the resolution documentation
The output follows the structured triage report format
